# SaSame Agent Passport Registry

> A public, outside-in observability registry of the AI agent economy: one machine-readable Agent Passport per public MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and x402 service. Verification status only — never a risk verdict on a named agent. Built by SaSame SRL.

## What it is
- 21,137 public MCP / agent endpoints indexed (30,000 registry entries across official MCP registry, Glama, PulseMCP, x402 discovery).
- Each endpoint gets a passport: identity confidence (unconfirmed -> self_asserted -> owner_proven -> corroborated) + outside-in observation (audit grade A/B/C/D) + what is still unconfirmed.
- Three levels: Observed (measured from outside, owner not confirmed) / Claimed (owner proved control) / Certified (continuously monitored).

## MCP Readiness Census (June 2026)
- A reproducible, aggregate verification-status report: of ~20,876 auditable public MCP endpoints, what share are reachable/callable/schema-valid (grades A/B/C/D), how registries disagree, and how that sits against external 2026 security research. Verification status only — no risk verdict on any named server.
- Human page: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/readiness-census-2026-06.html
- Machine-readable: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/data/readiness-census-latest.json (schema sasame-readiness-census-v0.1; carries a self_sha256 for reproducibility)

## MCP Directory Pre-Flight (free, for server operators submitting to a directory)
- If you are about to submit your MCP server to the Claude Connectors Directory or the ChatGPT Apps Directory, run a free pre-flight first. It catches the MECHANICAL reject reasons (missing tool annotations, untyped schemas, unclear descriptions, unreachable endpoint, generic errors, anti-ghost) before you submit. It is NOT a pass guarantee and does NOT cover privacy-policy content, identity/business verification, OAuth, or prohibited-category rules.
- Human page: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/preflight.html
- Run it: point audit_mcp(url) (grade + machine-readable preflight PF1-PF3) or readiness_report(url) (full report + Directory Pre-Flight section) at your own endpoint. Public MCP endpoint: https://live-vps.sasame.online/public-mcp . Handshake-only, no auth-bypass, no payment.

## How to claim your endpoint (free)
- If your MCP server or agent is listed as unclaimed, you can claim it for free to prove ownership and clear unconfirmed items.
- Open a prefilled claim issue: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/  (use "Find & claim your endpoint"), or https://github.com/shigeki7777/sasame-mcp-observatory/issues/new?template=claim-passport.yml
- Proof methods: .well-known file, DNS TXT, GitHub repo, agent-card linkback, or signed public key. No secrets required. Claiming, correcting, and delisting are always free.

## FAQ
- What is the SaSame MCP Observatory? A reproducible, external audit + registry of public MCP servers and x402 services, publishing signed readiness observations and per-agent Agent Passports.
- How do I claim an Agent Passport? Open a claim issue and prove control of your endpoint (well-known / DNS / repo / agent-card / signed key). It is free.
- How do you verify an MCP endpoint? A polite outside-in probe plus a legitimate MCP handshake (initialize + tools/list), graded against a 10-criterion discoverability standard. A GET probe alone is a weak signal — MCP answers over POST.
- Is this KYC or a risk score? No. Public endpoint observability only. No KYC, no enforcement, no operator geolocation, no badness verdict.


## Gold Vein (curated unclaimed A-grade cell)
- A small, daily-refreshed cell of unclaimed, owner-identifiable MCP endpoints that met the standard at grade A. Verification-status only — not a quality, safety, or trust ranking.
- Human page: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/gold-vein.html
- Machine-readable: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/gold-vein.json (schema gold-vein-v0.1; each item has claim_url, report_url, badge_url, delist_url)
- If one is yours: claim is free, one click, no sales call; correct or delist anytime.

## Observer Census (who maps the agent economy)
- We are observed. SaSame publishes a measured, PII-free roster of the self-declared SERVICE crawlers (registries, catalogs, quality/security indexes, liveness checkers, peer censuses) that fetch SaSame's public surfaces. Observation only — never a trust or safety verdict on any party.
- If your crawler/registry appears there, you can claim or correct your observed entry for free (same claim flow as endpoint passports). This is the honest way to be listed with an owner-confirmed record.
- Page: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/observers.html
- Machine-readable data: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/data/observer-census.json
